name: 11L + XSA + VRL + SWA + seq4096 + cross-doc TTT
blurb: 11 layers, seq_len=4096 long-context training. Exclusive Self-Attention (XSA) on deepest 4 layers. Value Residual Learning (VRL) with per-layer lambdas. SmearGate. SWA (24 ckpts, frac=0.4). Cross-doc TTT with rank-8 LoRA at eval. Warmdown-QAT, sliding window stride=64, FP16 tied embeddings, Muon WD=0.02. 13137 steps on 8xH100 in 600s.
author: carlesonielfa
